violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. -Need to wash hands before putting gloves on.
Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. -Need for chlorine bleach.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Secondary container of poisonous or toxic material was not clearly identified to indicated contents. -Spray bottle with bleach sanitizer not labeled.

Use of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Poisonous or toxic material was not used and/or applied in a way that prevents contamination to food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items. -Employees were uncertain on how much bleach to use for proper concentration when sanitizing dishes and soda nozzles.
Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 140F or above during display or service. -Hot dog on roller at 123F.
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
